HGSS.556.0000:
Ilex Forest Ahead
Enter through the gate.
HGSS.556.0001:
[0103,0000,0000]: ...Tell me something.\f
Is it true that Team Rocket has
returned?\f
What? You beat them? Hah!
Quit lying.\f
Are you serious?
Then let’s see how good you are.\f
HGSS.556.0002:
[0103,0000,0000]: I hate the weak.\f
Pokémon, Trainers.
It doesn’t matter who or what.\f
I hate to see them hanging around.
That goes for Team Rocket, too.\f
They think they are big and tough
as long as they are in a group.\f
But get them alone, and they’re weak.
I hate them all.\f
You stay out of my way.
You won’t be an exception\r
if you get in my way.\f
HGSS.556.0003:
Nothing is going on.
It’s unsafe to go in there, so I’m\r
standing guard to make sure\r
people don’t wander in.\f
Am I not a good Samaritan?
HGSS.556.0004:
Do you know about SlowpokeTail?
I heard it’s tasty!\f
Aren’t you glad I told you that?
HGSS.556.0005:
The SLOWPOKE have disappeared
from town...\f
I heard their tails are being sold
somewhere.
HGSS.556.0006:
The SLOWPOKE have returned.\f
Knowing them, they could’ve just been
taking it easy somewhere.
HGSS.556.0007:
Did you come to get Kurt to make
some Poké Balls?\r
A lot of people do just that.
HGSS.556.0008:
Cut through Azalea and you’ll be in
Ilex Forest.\f
But these skinny trees make it
impossible to get through.\f
The Charcoal Man’s Pokémon can cut
down trees.
HGSS.556.0011:
Azalea Town
Living Happily with Pokémon
HGSS.556.0012:
Kurt’s House\f
Apricorn and Nothing Else
The Stubborn Poké Ball Creator
HGSS.556.0013:
Azalea Town Pokémon Gym
Leader: Bugsy\r
The Walking Bug Pokémon Encyclopedia
HGSS.556.0014:
SLOWPOKE Well
Also known as the Rainmaker Well.\f
Locals believe that a SLOWPOKE’s
yawn summons the rain.\f
Records show that a SLOWPOKE’s yawn
ended a drought 400 years ago.
HGSS.556.0015:
Charcoal Kiln\f
We let our FARFETCH’D fetch branches
for charcoal!
HGSS.556.0016:
Who are you?
You don’t know us?\f
We are...
Team Rocket!\f
...What?
We broke up a while ago?\f
Give me a break!
We have not broken up!\f
Actually we did once.
But we have come back to\r
pursue Giovanni’s ambition.\f
Enough talking.
Shut up and just beat it!\f
HGSS.556.0018:
We have this tough guy called Kurt
in this town.\r
He should be able to take care of it...
HGSS.556.0019: I knew we could count on Kurt!
